reviews.comment:
Muy bien ubicada la playa. La presentación es muy bella. Ordenado, limpio y prolijo. Buena atención y servicio de los empleados. Lo negativo es el Full, ya que no se porque no trabajan con la App YPF y los beneficios de la misma, llámense promos, descuentos, aplicación de puntos, etc. Nos mandaron a la “estación del centro” o una “para allá” a 5 kilómetros. Una pena!

(Translated by Google)
The beach is very well located. The station is beautifully presented. It's tidy, clean, and well-maintained. The staff is very attentive and helpful. The only downside is the Full service station; I don't know why they don't work with the YPF app and its benefits, such as promotions, discounts, points accrual, etc. They directed us to the "downtown station" or one "over there" 5 kilometers away. What a shame!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnNHVyQzJRRRAB

reviews.comment:
No tenían aire, el trato del personal de boxes ante el pedido de un cricket porque pinchamos allí y eran las 18:30hs nos dejó sin nada, nos lo negó?? Además sin gasoil en una ciudad súper alejada. Todos se hacen los giles. 0 ayuda al turista. Además, “además nos dijeron si sos socio llama al servicio” malísima estación no preparada para atender al turismo. Dejan mucho que desear. Lejos a lo que era automóvil club Argentino. Patético trato con total indiferencia hacia nuestra necesidad. No vayan. No vayan a San Martín de Los Andes. Los servicios son malísimos. El pueblo se muere a partir de las 19hs. Nada para el turismo, nada para una urgencia. Y el ACA que debería estar al servicio como siempre lo fue. Deja mucho que desear por estos tiempos.

(Translated by Google)
They had no air conditioning. The pit crew's treatment of us when we asked for a tire repair kit because we got a flat there at 6:30 PM was appalling; they refused us everything. And on top of that, they didn't have diesel in a super remote town. Everyone played dumb. Zero help for tourists. Furthermore, they told us, "If you're a member, call customer service." A terrible station, completely unprepared to serve tourists. They leave much to be desired. A far cry from what the Argentine Automobile Club used to be. Pathetic treatment with total indifference to our needs. Don't go. Don't go to San Martín de Los Andes. The services are awful. The town shuts down after 7 PM. Nothing for tourists, nothing for emergencies. And the ACA, which should be providing service as it always has, leaves much to be desired these days.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM1OG83dk9REAE
